/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/test_gallery.dir/tests/test_gallery.cpp.o -o test_gallery   -L/opt/nvidia/deepstream/deepstream-9.0/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/nvidia/deepstream/deepstream-9.0/lib:/usr/local/cuda-13.1/targets/x86_64-linux/lib libmergenvision_recognition.a /usr/local/cuda-13.1/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/libcudart.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libnvinfer.so -lcjson /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so
